title: Electromechanical Systems
summary: This page covers electromechanical systems, specifically an armature-controlled DC motor driven by a current source. It derives the differential equation relating output angle to input torque for a rotational mechanical system, and extends this to a motor-driven load incorporating viscous damping and moment of inertia.

figures.caption: Rotational system for Drill 1.19 showing (a) a physical system with moment of inertia J, torsional spring K, and damper B subject to applied torque T(t), and (b) its free-body diagram with restoring torques Kθ(t) and Bθ̇(t).
